visible_entities.desc: A grey, blocky spacecraft with a central fuselage and two side-mounted engine nacelles emitting bright blue exhaust plumes.
visible_entities.action: flying through space, moving from left to right
visible_entities.position: left to center-left of the frame

visible_entities.desc: A large, dark celestial body, likely a planet or moon, with a visible curved horizon line.

atomic_facts.fact: The spacecraft has two distinct blue engine exhausts.
Small red lights are visible on the rear of the spacecraft.
The background is black space with scattered stars.
The celestial body on the right is mostly in shadow.

spatial: The spacecraft is positioned in the left half of the frame against a starry background, while a large, dark planetary body dominates the right side of the frame.

visible_entities.desc: small spacecraft with a boxy central body and bright blue glowing thrusters

spatial: The scene features a small spacecraft on the left and a large planetary body on the right, set against a starry black void.

visible_entities.position: Centered in the frame, occupying the majority of the vertical space.

The background is a solid, dark brown color.
The figure's mouth is slightly open.

spatial: A single figure is centered against a plain, dark background.

atomic_facts.fact: A standard SMPTE color bar test pattern serves as the background.
Dark, thick liquid drips from the top edge of the frame.
The text 'SIGNAL JAM DETECTED' is visible in the center.
The text 'UNAUTHORIZED TRANSMISSIONS' appears below the first line in the second frame, partially obscured by the dripping liquid.
The visual feed exhibits digital distortion or glitching effects.

spatial: The background consists of vertical color bars filling the screen. Dark liquid drips from the top edge down into the upper middle section. Text is centered horizontally. A row of rectangular color blocks runs along the bottom edge.
